title: Sci-fi · pasillo Wallace Corp neón
logline: Vignette atmosférica 8s sin diálogo. Agente camina por pasillo corporativo distópico tipo Wallace Corp. Composición Villeneuve centered symmetry, ritmo Deakins (3-5 tomas/min → solo 1-2 tomas en 8s, slow dolly <0.3 ft/s). Outro Dark Room 2s = total 10s.

references: K en Los Angeles aerial sequence opening (cool teal)
lens_specs: Zeiss Master Anamorphic 50mm T2.8 (anamorphic 1.3x ratio, no 2x)
research.lut_reference: DaVinci Resolve custom grade · cool teal base 4500K · shadows verde-gris · highlights cream · saturation -15% vs digital native · curve S extrema en blacks · ref Wallace Corp sequence amber+green neon hybrid
research.pacing_template: vignette atmospheric · 2 tomas en 8s (4s establishing + 4s detail close) · ritmo 15 takes/min (Villeneuve) NO ritmo Hollywood standard 30 takes/min
audio_references: Hans Zimmer · 'Mesa' BR2049 OST · drone subgrave 40-60Hz baseline
Benjamin Wallfisch · '2049' minimalist piano single sustained note
sound design: silencio >2s entre eventos · subgrave constante interiores (stress psicoacústica)
no music swell · ambient hum + foot reverb · single UI beep al final scan
research_sources: American Cinematographer Magazine Feb 2017 · Deakins exclusive interview

shots.structure_role: establishing wide · centered symmetry · agent silhouetted approaching
shots.prompt: ultra cinematic vertical 9:16 reel, lone silhouetted agent in long black trench coat walking slowly toward camera through a vast Wallace Corp futuristic corporate hallway, walls lined with vertical acid green neon strips #CFFF00, single key tungsten light source from above-front motivated by ceiling fixture (Roger Deakins single source philosophy), atmospheric haze and volumetric light shafts, wet polished concrete floor doubling neon strips in reflection, anamorphic 1.3x lens characteristics with horizontal flare on neon strips, shallow depth of field T2.8 isolating agent against vast space (Villeneuve centered symmetry composition with 70% environment 30% subject), slow dolly forward 0.2 ft/s tracking the agent, color grade cool teal 4500K base with green-amber hybrid highlights inspired by BR2049 Wallace Corp grade, saturation -15% vs default, photorealistic 8K detail, no text, no logos, no faces visible
shots.negative_prompt: smiling person, generic stock, watermark, low quality, deformed hands, text overlay, faces visible, oversaturated, shaky camera, handheld, fast cut
validation_must_have: vertical neon strips clearly visible on walls
single dominant light source (no multi-fill flat lighting)
agent silhouette centered in frame · NOT off-center
anamorphic horizontal lens flare on neon

shots.structure_role: detail close-up · push-in · biometric scan moment · single UI beep cue audio
shots.prompt: vertical 9:16 cinematic continuation, extreme close-up of the agent's gloved hand pressing against an acid green biometric door panel #CFFF00, fingerprint scan beam acid green sweeping vertically across hand, single floating holographic UI element (no readable text, just abstract geometric shapes) in mid-air beside the panel, deep blacks in shadow areas, fine 35mm grain texture, single key tungsten light from upper-right (Roger Deakins ASC signature), Zeiss Master Anamorphic 50mm characteristics with shallow DOF T2.8, very slow push-in dolly 0.1 ft/s, color grade Wallace Corp BR2049 amber+green hybrid (DaVinci Resolve custom curve), photorealistic 8K, no text, no faces, no logos
shots.negative_prompt: readable text in holographic UI, watermark, smiling, generic UI, faces, multi-source flat lighting, oversaturated, fast camera move
validation_must_have: no readable text in holographic UI
biometric scan beam acid green clearly visible
depth of field blur in background

music.style: Hans Zimmer · BR2049 'Mesa' style drone subgrave 40-60Hz baseline + single sustained piano note (Wallfisch)
music.suno_keywords: Hans Zimmer Vangelis Blade Runner 2049 atmospheric drone subgrave dark cinematic minimalist single piano note sustained

sfx.name: atmospheric_hum_continuous
sfx.description: subgrave 40Hz constant interior hum (stress psicoacústica BR2049)

sfx.name: footstep_reverb_distant
sfx.description: single footstep with long reverb tail · ref Sapper Morton opening sound design

sfx.name: ui_scan_beep_acid
sfx.description: single high-frequency UI beep when biometric scan triggers · NO comp swell

sfx.name: silence_2s_breath
sfx.description: silencio estratégico >2s · ref Villeneuve breathing room

sfx.name: fade_to_outro
sfx.description: fade out hum into outro Dark Room

caption_text:
Esto no existe. Lo generé en 12 minutos.

Referente real: Blade Runner 2049 · DP Roger Deakins · ARRI Alexa 65 · Zeiss Master Anamorphic 50mm · grading Wallace Corp
Stack: Cinema Studio Video 3.0 + Suno (drone Zimmer-style)
Coste real: ~$0.40
Tiempo total: 12 min (research + render + edit)

Acceso a este stack en bio · Dark Room · 24,90€/mes

approval_required.reason: tier=top usa Cinema Studio Video 3.0 (premium · documentado en feedback_doble_aprobacion_videos.md y feedback_calidad_top_aprovecha_unlimited.md)

validation_checklist_extra: técnica Deakins citada en prompts (single key, anamorphic, centered symmetry)
audio Zimmer/Wallfisch style con drone subgrave y silencio estratégico >2s
ritmo Villeneuve (2 tomas en 8s, NO 4-5 tomas como Hollywood standard)
rostro NUNCA legible (silueta + close hand only)
outro Dark Room a partir del segundo 8 (durante 2s)
verificar grading cool teal + green-amber hybrid (NO verde Matrix puro NI cyan oversaturated)
